projects.title: ULAA-Net: Unsupervised Organ Anomaly Detection
projects.description: Developed an unsupervised anomlay detection model for organ-specific medical imaging.
projects.longDescription: A medical anomaly detection model utilising deep learning models trained on medical imaging data. The system assists healthcare professionals in identifying potential health issues early, improving patient outcomes through timely intervention.

projects.title: Arbor: Financial Adviser Bot
projects.description: Built a full-stack financial adviser bot platform to improve financial literacy with real-time market data visualization, AI-powered insights, and financial learning features.
projects.longDescription: A financial dashboard that aims to integrate AI and seemless UI/UX to improve financial literacy.

projects.title: Nota: AI-Powered Note-taking App
projects.description: Created a Markdown-base note taking app that integrate AI for review/quizing based on the users notes.
projects.longDescription: A app geared towards improving the efficiency of note-taking by utlising modern technologies like, Markdown and AI.

projects.title: Image Processing App
projects.description: Created an image processing app that allows users to play around with different types of legacy image filters.
projects.longDescription: A image processing project that utilises varying mathematical algorithms that adjusts and interacts with RGB and other types of colour channels.

projects.title: Interactive Data Visualisation Platform
projects.description: Developed a web-based platform for creating interactive data visualisations.
projects.longDescription: A data visualisation project that helps users interact with varying types of data visualisations.

projects.title: EchoPhoto Branding & UI
projects.description: A comprehensive branding and web design project for a premium photography studio.
projects.longDescription: Designed a minimalist yet impactful brand identity for EchoPhoto, including logo design, color palette, and a full-responsive website prototype that emphasizes visual storytelling.

projects.title: Digital Illustration Series: Nebula
projects.description: A series of digital illustrations exploring themes of identity and the cosmos.
projects.longDescription: A personal project that blends East Asian artistic styles with futuristic sci-fi elements, reflecting my heritage and passion for speculative design.

projects.title: Urban Exploration Photography
projects.description: A collection of urban photography focusing on the intersection of nature and architecture.
projects.longDescription: Captured various cityscapes and architectural details that showcase the 'messy but professional' aesthetic I strive for in my work.
